name: Ironfall Company
specialty: Known for their precision in navigating the unpredictable rifts, the Ironfall Company is a feared team for their ability to salvage valuable artifacts and resources from the tear-riddled reality.

members.name: Vexa Ironfall
members.note: A scar from a rift accident runs down her left cheek, a constant reminder of the line between life and death.

members.name: Grimm Stoneweaver
members.note: Grimm is known to carry a pet raven, a gift from the rift, which helps him in locating the unfindable.

members.name: Zephyr Serpentwhisper
members.note: Zephyr's eyes glow faintly green, a result of years of exposure to the rift energies, making him a prime target for the Serpent Choir.

visual: Clad in leather armor stitched with serpent emblems, they move with purpose, their weapons polished to a mirror shine. The trio carries an air of professionalism and experience, garnering respect from the citizens of the Undercity.
reputation_note: Rumored to have a contract with the Serpent Choir, their services come at a steep price, but the risks they take always seem to pay off.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a investigation-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
